hero.title: Optimize Your Website with Powerful A/B Testing
hero.subtitle: Run experiments, analyze results, and boost conversions with our enterprise-grade experimentation platform. Make data-driven decisions that drive real growth.

common.start_building: Start building your amazing project here!

features.title: Everything You Need to Experiment
features.subtitle: Powerful tools designed for modern teams who want to ship faster and smarter.

experiment_builder.title: Experiment Builder
experiment_builder.description: Visual editor to create and deploy A/B tests without writing code. Drag-and-drop interface with live preview.

realtime_analytics.title: Real-time Analytics
realtime_analytics.description: Monitor experiment performance as it happens. Live dashboards with statistical significance indicators.

conversion_tracking.title: Conversion Tracking
conversion_tracking.description: Track every conversion event across your funnel. Custom goals, revenue tracking, and attribution models.

feature_flags.title: Feature Flags
feature_flags.description: Roll out features gradually with powerful targeting rules. Segment users and control rollout percentage.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Get started in minutes, not days.

step1.title: Create Experiment
step1.description: Define your hypothesis, set up variants, and configure targeting rules with our intuitive builder.

step2.title: Split Traffic
step2.description: Automatically distribute visitors across variants with our intelligent traffic allocation engine.

step3.title: Analyze Results
step3.description: Get statistically significant results with our Bayesian engine. Make confident decisions backed by data.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Scale as you grow. No hidden fees.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Data-Driven Teams
testimonials.subtitle: See how leading companies optimize their digital experiences.
testimonials.label: Testimonials

items.quote: We increased our conversion rate by 34% in just 3 months using ABFlow. The real-time analytics made it easy to make fast, confident decisions.
items.name: Sarah Chen

items.quote: The experiment builder is incredibly intuitive. Our team went from zero tests to running 15 concurrent experiments within the first week.
items.name: Marcus Rodriguez

items.quote: Feature flags changed how we ship software. We can now deploy with confidence and roll back instantly if something goes wrong.
items.name: Emily Watson

footer.description: The modern experimentation platform for data-driven teams.
